recommendations.title: Stranger Than Paradise

recommendations.title: Moneyball
recommendations.overview: The story of Oakland Athletics general manager Billy Beane's successful attempt to put together a baseball team on a budget, by employing computer-generated analysis to draft his players.

recommendations.title: The Watermelon Woman
recommendations.overview: A young black lesbian filmmaker probes into the life of The Watermelon Woman, a 1930s black actress who played 'mammy' archetypes.

recommendations.title: Born into Brothels: Calcutta's Red Light Kids
recommendations.overview: Documentary depicting the lives of child prostitutes in the red light district of Songachi, Calcutta. Director Zana Briski went to photograph the prostitutes when she met and became friends with their children. Briski began giving photography lessons

recommendations.title: That Most Important Thing: Love
recommendations.overview: Servais Mont, a freelance photographer who works taking compromising photos, gets fascinated by Nadine Chevalier, a tormented low-budget movie actress married to an eccentric film photo collector.
